message:
fix(messaging): stub broker test isolation guard, NATS frame parse cleanup

Kafka stub broker tests shared global state without synchronization,
causing flaky failures under parallel test execution.  Introduced a
`StubBrokerTestGuard` backed by a static Mutex that serializes access
and auto-resets the broker on drop.  All producer and consumer tests now
acquire the guard before entering the test body, eliminating cross-test
contamination from the global StubBroker singleton.

NATS frame parser: removed unnecessary else-after-return blocks in the
+OK, PING, and PONG parsers.  The control flow was already fully
determined by early returns, so the else branches added visual noise
without changing behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
